race.comment: LET IT RIDE (5) won his maiden two back at Murray Bridge then didn't have the turn of foot required when midfield over the mile at the same venue last start. Looking for this sort of trip now after four runs back from a spell. EISMOND (3) collected her maiden win when resuming over this distance at Stawell before struggling at Morphettville last time. In the money at six of nine runs over today's trip and should be thereabouts again in this more suitable contest. VEE ROD (9) wasn't far away over today's journey at Naracoorte two starts ago then didn't run on from midfield more recently at Bordertown. Will race closer from a better draw today and can improve. VIVID BLOOMS (6) won a Kyneton maiden with authority last start at her sixth appearance. Not raced for a month which is the query but she is heading the right way. FLEURIEU FLIPPER (10) returned to form at Strathalbyn last time out and will appreciate a bit more ground here.
